# Muhammad Hafizh Maulidan — Full Context

## Identity
- **Name:** Muhammad Hafizh Maulidan
- **Role:** Head of Unit & Production Leader at Rumah Susu Indonesia
- **Location:** Bogor / Tasikmalaya, West Java, Indonesia
- **Languages:** Indonesian (native), English (professional)
- **Education:** B.Eng, IPB University (Institut Pertanian Bogor), GPA 3.33/4.00

## Professional Summary
Operations & Production Leader with hands-on experience in end-to-end dairy manufacturing. Background encompasses the full dairy value chain — from raw milk quality assessment and pasteurization to cold chain distribution and quality systems. Proven track record scaling production from initial setup to 2,000–3,500 liters per week while maintaining a reject rate under 1%.

## Current Role — Head of Unit at Rumah Susu Indonesia
- Lead daily production operations for pasteurized milk and moza cheese
- Manage lean team of 4 across receiving, processing, QC, and distribution
- Developed complete SOP architecture and QC protocols
- Implemented lactoscan analysis, alcohol test, and peroxide test procedures
- Designed and deployed cold chain monitoring system
- Built milk quality dashboard for real-time decision support
- Coordinate supply chain from raw milk procurement to distribution

## Key Projects

### Rumah Susu Inventory Dashboard
Real-time inventory management dashboard using Next.js, TypeScript, and Google Sheets API. Provides live stock opname monitoring and supply chain visibility for dairy production.

### Milk Quality Prediction Model
Machine learning model that predicts pasteurized milk quality grade from 7 production parameters. Achieves 0.92 F1 weighted score using Random Forest and XGBoost classifiers.

### Production Operations SOP Suite
Comprehensive production architecture and standard operating procedures for dairy processing at 25,000 units per batch capacity. Covers raw milk receiving, pasteurization, filling, cold storage, and distribution.

## Skills

### Operations & Production Management
SOP Development, Cold Chain Management, Production Planning, Quality Control (Lactoscan, Alcohol & Peroxide Tests), Traceability Systems, Supply Chain Coordination, Team Leadership, Inventory Management, Food Safety

### Engineering & Technical Foundation
Data Analysis & Machine Learning (Python, scikit-learn, TensorFlow), IoT Systems (ESP32, sensors), Web Development (React, Next.js, Node.js), IT Support

## Certifications
- LSP Digital Marketing (BNSP certified)
- Machine Learning Operations (DBS Foundation)
- Data Science & AI (DBS Foundation)
- Basic Barista (BNSP certified)
- Occupational Health & Safety (K3)
- MS Excel for Data Processing

## Publications
- "Response of Strawberry Microgreen Growth to LED Light Color Variations" — research on controlled environment agriculture
